name: templates: skills/react-component-build (R-5) copies these three templates into a fresh project when invoked
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/_install.sh" --target "$PWD/proj" --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep "vitest.react.config.ts" out.txt 1>&2 && grep "playwright.config.ts" out.txt 1>&2 && grep "size-limit.config.js" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
